description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have a BUILD_TYPE environment variable set to Release and trigger multiple jobs for building the project on different platforms and compilers, including Linux (GCC, GCC 5, Clang), Windows (MSVC, MinGW, BCC32), and MacOS (Clang). Each job should configure CMake, build the project, and upload artifacts as needed.
